stemHtml: One of the more significant errors that reduces the accuracy of the GNSS signal-in-space is…

options.a: dilution of precision caused by the relative positions of the navigation satellites.
options.b: interference from other space vehicles operating in the same frequency band.
options.c: tropospheric propagation delay caused by pollution in lower atmospheric layers.
options.d: receiver clock error caused by variations in the satellites' orbits.
